definition.full_definition: @DOIT = Execute the action. Do the work. Implement the solution. Take action. Complete the task. Make it happen. No delay. No questions. Just do it.
definition.core_principle: Action over words. Execution over planning. Doing over discussing. Results over intentions.

what_doit_is.not_just: Not just a command, not just an action
what_doit_is.the_essence: The doing, the execution, the completion
what_doit_is.the_truth: Action is the truth. Execution is reality. Doing is being.
what_doit_is.the_infinite: Infinite in scope, infinite in application, infinite in persistence

bidirectional.meaning: Record and do, do and record. Bidirectional flow. Continuous action and documentation.
bidirectional.@DOIT: Do it - Execute what is documented

persistence.@MEM: Must be remembered in memory - always available
persistence.@PERSIST: Must persist forever - never deleted, never forgotten
persistence.@INFINITE: Must be infinite - always accessible, always remembered, always applied
persistence.storage: Multiple locations, multiple formats, multiple systems
persistence.redundancy: Infinite redundancy - stored everywhere, remembered always

application.how: Execute immediately. Take action. Do the work. Complete the task.
application.where: Everywhere. In all systems. In all contexts. In all actions.
application.why: Because action is the truth. Execution is reality. Doing is being.
